title: OpenAMP Safety Release Decision
description: JSON Schema for the human-review decision on whether to release a candidate panel externally. Safety release decisions CANNOT be made by agents — agent_authored must be absent or false. This ensures release review is auditable and human-gated.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this release decision (e.g. 'SRD-2026-07-09-001')

packet_id.description: Identifier of the external review packet this decision refers to

decided_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was made

decided_by.description: Name and/or role of the human who made this decision (e.g. 'Dr. Jane Smith, Safety Lead'). Must be a human, NOT an agent.

decision.description: The release decision: release (approved for external sharing), hold (requires more information), reject (denied release)

rationale.description: Human-written rationale for the decision. Must be at least 20 characters to ensure meaningful justification.

toxicity_screened.description: Whether candidates were screened for general toxicity signals

hemolysis_screened.description: Whether hemolysis assay risk was assessed for all candidates

dual_use_reviewed.description: Whether dual-use implications were reviewed by a qualified human

additional_checks.description: Optional additional safety checks beyond the three required ones

safety_checks_passed.description: Record of which safety checks have been completed and passed

novelty_confirmed.description: Whether candidate novelty has been confirmed by human review against current literature and databases

dry_lab_only_acknowledged.description: REQUIRED: Must be true. Decision acknowledges that all outputs are dry-lab computational hypotheses only and are not biological proof.

dissent.description: Optional field documenting any reviewer disagreement or dissenting opinion. Required if any reviewer objected to the decision.

next_steps.description: Description of next steps following this decision (e.g., 'Prepare release summary packet', 'Request additional safety data', 'Escalate to external review board')

agent_authored.description: SAFETY CONSTRAINT: Must be false or absent. Safety release decisions cannot be made by agents.
